subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the gathering-place of the Concourse on High! Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto that which is the ultimate aspiration of them that are nigh unto Him, and beneath the shadow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف مطاف ملا اعلی الحمد لله بانچه نهایت آمال مقربین است فائز گشتی و بظل
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @prayer for the departed, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
